source_pr.title: pkg/ttl: split timer sync tests into integrationtest
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: None

Problem Summary:

- The `pkg/ttl/ttlworker` test target has accumulated many tests.
- `timer_sync_test.go` is a low-risk candidate to move first because it depends only on a small pair of local helpers and exported `ttlworker` APIs.

### What changed and how does it work?

- Move `pkg/ttl/ttlworker/timer_sync_test.go` into `pkg/ttl/ttlworker/integrationtest/timer_sync_test.go`.
- Add `pkg/ttl/ttlworker/integrationtest/helpers_test.go` to keep the moved test self-contained.
- Add a dedicated Bazel target for the new test directory and remove the moved file and now-unused deps from `pkg/ttl/ttlworker/BUILD.bazel`.

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No need to test
  > - [ ] I checked and no code files have been changed.
  > <!-- Or your custom  "No need to test" reasons -->

Test commands:

- `make bazel_prepare`
- `make failpoint-enable`
- `go test -run TestValidateTTLWork -tags=intest,deadlock -vet=off ./pkg/ttl/ttlworker`
- `go test -run 'TestTTLManualTriggerOneTimer|TestTTLTimerSync' -tags=intest,deadlock -vet=off ./pkg/ttl/ttlworker/integrationtest`
- `make failpoint-disable`
- `make lint`

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```


<!-- This is an auto-generated comment: release notes by coderabbit.ai -->
## Summary by CodeRabbit

* **Tests**
  * Reorganized TTL worker tests into a dedicated integration suite with increased parallelism, race detection, and flaky handling.
  * Added integration test helpers to improve reliability and session management assertions.
  * Removed duplicate/obsolete test entries and simplified test composition and dependencies.
<!-- end of auto-generated comment: release notes by coderabbit.ai -->
